R

RANDOM_SEED - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
RandomBoolean() - Static method in class org.sim.RND
Generates a random boolean.
RandomFloat(float, float) - Static method in class org.sim.RND
Generates a random decimal float number between a minimum and a maximum value range.
RandomVector2(float, float, float, float) - Static method in class org.sim.RND
Generates a random 2D vector coordinate within specified boundary box coordinates.
ReproductionEnergyUse - Static variable in class org.sim.fish.Fish
 
Reset() - Method in class org.sim.fish.FOVInfo
Clears all vision data and resets detection flags before the next scan step.
RND - Class in org.sim
Static utility class providing convenient helper methods for random number generation.
RND() - Constructor for class org.sim.RND
